name: tubetrend
description: YouTube trend analysis tool - analyze video performance, track favorites, and discover trending content
author: fo0 <fo0@fo0.me>

scripts.electron:dist: ELECTRON=true vite build && npm run electron:icon && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json
scripts.build:chromebook: ELECTRON=true vite build && npm run electron:icon && electron-builder --config electron-builder.chromebook.json --linux
scripts.build:win: ELECTRON=true vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win portable
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:build: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.cap:build:debug: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
